name: nodeget-cloudflare-ddns
description: Cloudflare DDNS bridge running on the NodeGet js-worker (QuickJS) platform. Server-side cron dispatches an ad-hoc task to the home agent, parses its public IP, and PATCHes the Cloudflare DNS record.
author: astring0 <27602232+astring0@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.deploy:print: node build.mjs && node -e "import('fs').then(fs => process.stdout.write(fs.readFileSync('dist/worker.js','utf8').length + ' bytes built; base64 of dist/worker.js:\n' + Buffer.from(fs.readFileSync('dist/worker.js')).toString('base64') + '\n'))"
